title: Phantom Ganon
description: This datapack adds Phantom Ganon from Zelda: The Wind Waker, no resource pack required!
body:

# Phantom Ganon

Phantom Ganon is a miniboss from Zelda: The Wind Waker, appearing the first time in the Forsaken Fortress. This datapack was made for mapmaking.

![Battle preview](https://i.imgur.com/5k1KSOP.gif)

## His abilities
- Can throw magic balls at you
  - If you send them back, he can dodge them with his sword
- Has 250 hearts (500 health)
- Is immune to basic arrows
- When damaged, goes back on the ground

## Audio
The original audio is included in the mod, split into 2 sections:
- Intro
- Looping section

## How to find him?
You can't find him naturally, the datapack was made for mapmaking. You need to summon it with /function phantom_ganon:phantom_ganon

Map using this miniboss if you want to try it directly:
[Ganon's Tower](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/ganon-s-tower/)

## Dependencies

- None! You can download an optional resource pack for audio, but it isn't required!
